name: @tootallnate/bfwav
description: Parser and audio decoder for Nintendo's BFWAV (FWAV magic) format — the standalone single-shot audio file used across Wii U / Switch first-party games. Decodes DSP-ADPCM and PCM16/PCM8 to interleaved PCM16 samples and (optionally) wraps the result in a RIFF WAVE blob ready for HTML5 <audio>.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
